Petty Officer 1st Class Emana Zulu

Armor - Ranged Weapons - Melee Weapons - Gear - Background - Associated NPCs - Associated Starships - Associated Factions

Age: 41

Sex: F

Career/Occupation: Engineer; former Navy Engineering Tech

Race: Uplifted Ape, chimpanzee variety

Emana is an uplifted ape of the chimpanzee variety. Her high strength is a real asset in working on the ship. When not actively working, she tends to keep to herself.

As an engineer, Emana has become a professional in all shipboard systems. Few engineers ever accomplish that. This is exactly the reason Emana holds the position of lead engineer. Her knowledge and skill tend to put down suggestions from others saying she was recruited for appearances, or that the Amelia Grace's crew are trying to appear favorable to a wide variety of races.
